overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long FIG Daily ETF (FIGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Figma, Inc., (NYSE: FIG) stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective FIGG was launched on Oct 14, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
